package com.example.appserver.cache;

import org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
import org.mockito.Mockito;

class CacheInitializerTest {

    private SettingVariableCache settingVariableCache;
    private MailTemplateCache mailTemplateCache;
    private ErrorCodeCache errorCodeCache;
    private CacheInitializer cacheInitializer;

    @BeforeEach
    void setUp() {
        settingVariableCache = Mockito.mock(SettingVariableCache.class);
        mailTemplateCache = Mockito.mock(MailTemplateCache.class);
        errorCodeCache = Mockito.mock(ErrorCodeCache.class);

        cacheInitializer = new CacheInitializer(
                settingVariableCache,
                mailTemplateCache,
                errorCodeCache
        );
    }

    @Test
    void testInit_shouldCallUpdateCacheOnAllCaches() {
        // 実行
        cacheInitializer.init();

        // 検証
        Mockito.verify(settingVariableCache).updateCache();
        Mockito.verify(mailTemplateCache).updateCache();
        Mockito.verify(errorCodeCache).updateCache();

        // 余分な呼び出しがないことを確認
        Mockito.verifyNoMoreInteractions(settingVariableCache, mailTemplateCache, errorCodeCache);
    }
}
